tocMobile_ITEo"><button type="button" class="clean-btn tocCollapsibleButton_TO0P">On this page</button></div><div class="theme-doc-markdown markdown"><header><h1>Plugins</h1></header>
<p>Plugins allow you to extend the library's functionality and render custom elements, such as new series, drawing tools, indicators, and watermarks.</p>
<p>You can create plugins of the following types:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="#custom-series">Custom series</a> — define new types of series.</li>
<li><a href="#primitives">Primitives</a> — define custom visualizations, drawing tools, and
chart annotations that can be attached to an existing series (<a href="#series-primitives">series primitives</a>) or chart pane (<a href="#pane-primitives">pane primitives</a>).</li>
</ul>
<div class="theme-admonition theme-admonition-tip admonition_xJq3 alert alert--success"><div class="admonitionHeading_Gvgb"><span class="admonitionIcon_Rf37"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M6.5 0C3.48 0 1 2.19 1 5c0 .92.55 2.25 1 3 1.34 2.25 1.78 2.78 2 4v1h5v-1c.22-1.22.66-1.75 2-4 .45-.75 1-2.08 1-3 0-2.81-2.48-5-5.5-5zm3.64 7.48c-.25.44-.47.8-.67 1.11-.86 1.41-1.25 2.06-1.45 3.23-.02.05-.02.11-.02.17H5c0-.06 0-.13-.02-.17-.2-1.17-.59-1.83-1.45-3.23-.2-.31-.42-.67-.67-1.11C2.44 6.78 2 5.65 2 5c0-2.2 2.02-4 4.5-4 1.22 0 2.36.42 3.22 1.19C10.55 2.94 11 3.94 11 5c0 .66-.44 1.78-.86 2.48zM4 14h5c-.23 1.14-1.3 2-2.5 2s-2.27-.86-2.5-2z"></path></svg></span>Tips</div><div class="admonitionContent_BuS1"><ul>
<li>Use the <a href="https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-lwc-plugin" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">create-lwc-plugin</a> npm package to quickly scaffold a project for your custom plugin.</li>
<li>Explore the <a href="https://tradingview.github.io/lightweight-charts/plugin-examples" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Plugin Examples Demo</a> page that hosts interactive examples of heatmaps, alerts, watermarks, and tooltips implemented with plugins. You can find the code of these examples in the <a href="https://github.com/tradingview/lightweight-charts/tree/master/plugin-examples" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><code>plugin-examples</code></a> folder in the Lightweight Charts™ repository.</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h2 class="anchor anchorWithStickyNavbar_LWe7" id="custom-series">Custom series<a href="#custom-series" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Custom series" title="Direct link to Custom series">​</a></h2>
<p>Custom series allow you to define new types of series with custom data structures and rendering logic.
For implementation details, refer to the <a href="/lightweight-charts/docs/plugins/custom_series">Custom Series Types</a> article.</p>
<p>Use the <a href="/lightweight-charts/docs/api/interfaces/IChartApi#addcustomseries"><code>addCustomSeries</code></a> method to add a custom series to the chart.
Then, you can manage it through the same API available for built-in series.
For example, call the <a href="/lightweight-charts/docs/api/interfaces/ISeriesApi#setdata"><code>setData</code></a> method to populate the series with data.</p>

<h2 class="anchor anchorWithStickyNavbar_LWe7" id="primitives">Primitives<a href="#primitives" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Primitives" title="Direct link to Primitives">​</a></h2>
<p>Primitives allow you to define custom visualizations, drawing tools, and chart annotations. You can render them at different
levels in the visual stack to create complex, layered compositions.</p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorWithStickyNavbar_LWe7" id="series-primitives">Series primitives<a href="#series-primitives" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Series primitives" title="Direct link to Series primitives">​</a></h3>
<p>Series primitives are attached to a specific series and can render on the main pane, price and
time scales. For implementation details, refer to the <a href="/lightweight-charts/docs/plugins/series-primitives">Series Primitives</a> article.</p>
<p>Use the <a href="/lightweight-charts/docs/api/interfaces/ISeriesApi#attachprimitive"><code>attachPrimitive</code></a> method to add a primitive to the chart and attach it to the series.</p>

<h3 class="anchor anchorWithStickyNavbar_LWe7" id="pane-primitives">Pane primitives<a href="#pane-primitives" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Pane primitives" title="Direct link to Pane primitives">​</a></h3>
<p>Pane primitives are attached to a chart pane rather than a specific series. You can use them to create chart-wide annotations and features like watermarks.
For implementation details, refer to the <a href="/lightweight-charts/docs/plugins/pane-primitives">Pane Primitives</a> article.</p>
